rationale.R1.3: The agent provides a detailed analysis of the alignment between claims and evidence, including a comparison of AURIX with RawNet2 and per-attack accuracy.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty by using hedges and qualifiers throughout the revised section.
rationale.RX.3: The revised section focuses on the evaluation partition rather than the active set requested.
rationale.RX.4: The revised section does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The revised section does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
